basic_details.job_title: South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for Project Manager, Junior Data Analyst and More Posts
basic_details.department: Data Science Department, CISO Office, IT Department
basic_details.short_information: South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026: Get the latest South Indian Bank Ltd. recruitment notification 2026 for various roles across Data Science Department, CISO Office, and IT Department including Junior Data Analyst/SQL Developer/BI Developer, Cyber Risk Threat Modeler, GRC Compliance Officer, SIEM Analyst, SOC Analyst, Firewall Rule Review Manager, Business Solutioning Analyst, UAT Test Engineer, Software Developers, CBS Administrator, Network Admin, Database Administrator, Project Manager, and more. The online application process starts on 15th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 25

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on Bank's website

age_limit.details: Age criteria vary by role and scale from a maximum of 30 years (Scale I - junior roles) to a maximum of 45 years (Scale III - Production Support Lead). Refer to the vacancy table above for role-wise age limits.

qualification.details: All candidates must hold the prescribed educational qualification from a recognized university with a minimum of 50% marks and possess the required post-qualification work experience relevant to the applied role. Confirmation of appointment will be subject to satisfactory performance during the probation period. The scale of appointment will be fixed by management. Selected candidates are liable for transfer anywhere in India at the sole discretion of the Bank, and must be willing to carry out any other work or assignments as assigned by the Bank from time to time. | Educational Qualification (Common)

vacancy_details.Role: Junior Data Analyst / SQL Developer / BI Developer
Cyber Security Analyst - SIEM (Incident Response Team)
SOC Analyst (Threat Hunting, Malware & Digital Forensic)

salary_details.pay_scale: IBA approved scale of pay for Scale I/II/III Officers including DA, HRA, Special Allowance, and other allowances + Performance Linked Incentive
salary_details.details: IBA approved scale of pay for Scale I / Scale II / Scale III Officers, including Dearness Allowance, HRA, Special Allowance, and other allowances. Performance Linked Incentive as applicable to Scale I/II/III officers will be paid as per the scheme in vogue.

selection_process: Shortlisting Based on eligibility, qualifications, and experience as per Bank's discretion
Preliminary and/or Personal Interview Only shortlisted candidates will be called; call letters will be sent via Email only (no hard copy)

Selection will be based on shortlisting followed by Preliminary and/or Personal Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for interview. Mere eligibility does not vest any right on the applicant to be called for the recruitment process. The Bank reserves the right to make required modifications to the selection process and to decide the number of applicants to be called
based on the volume of applications received. Shortlisting will be solely at the Bank's discretion. In all matters regarding eligibility and selection
the Bank's decision will be final and binding.
All marks/scores/grades obtained at any stage of the selection process will be treated as strictly confidential and will not be disclosed to any party
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Bank's website www.southindianbank.bank.in from 15.05.2026 to 25.05.2026. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates must ensure a valid email ID is available in their name before registering. There is no provision to modify the submitted online application - candidates must take utmost care while filling up the form.

Multiple registrations for the same role will lead to disqualification. On successful submission, a system-generated User ID (Application Ref. ID) will be generated and an email with application PDF and login credentials will be shared to the registered email ID. Application status can be checked by logging into the profile. Only successfully submitted applications will be considered.
Documents to be uploaded at the time of online application:
Photograph: Recent passport-size color photo, white background, no caps/hats/dark glasses; Resolution 378×437 pixels; max size 50 KB.
Signature: Signed on white paper with black ink pen; Resolution 140×110 pixels; max size 50 KB.
Resume: PDF format; max size 1 MB.

Physical copy of the application need not be sent. Candidates are advised to visit the Careers page on the Bank's website regularly for future updates and to avoid last-minute submission due to possible website congestion near the closing date.
Apply Online at: www.southindianbank.bank.in → About Us → Careers
For queries contact: Toll Free: 0484 2771383 / 1800-425-1809 / 1800-102-9408 | Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: Beware of fraudulent job alerts - apply only through the official online portal; all communication will be via official channels only. Candidates must ensure they fulfil all eligibility criteria (age, qualification, experience) before applying. Information furnished in the online application will be treated as final; if found false at a later date, selection/appointment will be liable for termination. SC/ST candidates must submit attested copies of certificates from a competent authority to prove their status as and when called. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification. Candidates must appear for the recruitment process at their own cost. Only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India should apply. Appointment is subject to medical fitness, satisfactory background verification including CIBIL/credit history check, police clearance check, and completion of other formalities as per Bank rules. Shortlisting is provisional and without verification of original documents; candidature is subject to document verification when called for interview/training/joining. Call letters will be sent via email only - no hard copy will be sent. All revisions/corrigendum will be hosted on the Bank's website only. Candidates must retain two copies of the photograph used in the application for use at the time of recruitment process. The Bank does not assume responsibility for inability to submit application due to internet unavailability or any reason beyond its control.

faq.question: Q1. What is South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026 is a hiring drive for experienced professionals in the Data Science Department, CISO Office, and IT Department for officer posts in Scale I, II, and III. The recruitment is open to Indian nationals with specific qualifications and work experience as mentioned in the official notifications.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 15 May 2026 and ends on 25 May 2026, and no other mode of application is accepted. The interview dates and further stages will be notified later on the Bank’s official website only.

faq.question: Q3. Which departments and roles are included in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment covers 24 roles across three departments – Data Science Department, CISO Office, and IT Department. Key roles include Junior Data Analyst/SQL Developer/BI Developer, Cyber Risk Threat Modeler, various GRC and SOC roles, Software Developers, Administrators, Network and Database roles, Full Stack and iOS Developers, and Project Manager.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for South Indian Bank specialist posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have at least 50 percent marks in eligible degrees like B.Tech/B.E, MCA, M.Sc (IT/CS or Cyber Security related), BCA, B.Sc (IT/CS/CA), and MBA for Project Manager, from recognized universities. In addition, each post requires specific minimum post-qualification work experience in relevant domains such as data analytics, cyber security, IT development, infrastructure, and project management.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by role, typically ranging from 30 years for junior Scale I roles (like Developer-LOS, CBS Admin, Network Support) to 45 years for senior roles like Production Support Lead. SC/ST candidates get a relaxation of 5 years over the specified upper age limit, subject to valid certificates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category of candidates for this recruitment. Candidates can submit their applications free of cost through the official online recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for South Indian Bank specialist officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of shortlisting based on eligibility, qualifications, and experience, followed by a preliminary and/or personal interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview, and the Bank’s decision regarding shortlisting and selection will be final.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary and pay scale for South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed on IBA-approved Scale I, II, or III officer pay scales, which include basic pay along with Dearness Allowance, HRA, Special Allowance, and other admissible benefits. They are also eligible for Performance Linked Incentive as per the scheme applicable to officers in these scales.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for South Indian Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the Bank’s website by navigating to About Us → Careers → Current Openings and selecting the relevant notification. After registration, applicants must fill the form carefully, upload photograph, signature, and resume in the prescribed format, and submit the application to receive a system-generated Application Reference ID via email.

faq.question: Q10. What documents and precautions should candidates follow while applying?
faq.answer: Applicants must upload a recent passport-size photograph, scanned signature, and updated resume as per the size and format guidelines given in the notification. Since there is no option to edit the application after submission and multiple registrations for the same role lead to disqualification, candidates should verify all details carefully before final submission and rely only on the official website to avoid fraudulent job offers.
